name: Natura · LCP/CLS regression (RUM)

actions.title: 📉 Natura · vitals деградация (LCP/CLS)
actions.body: p75 LCP/CLS превысил cap. {{event.measurements}} {{issue.url}}. Hero/font swap проверить.

_notes: Premium-brand SLA: LCP p75 ≤ 2500ms, CLS p75 ≤ 0.1. Cormorant Garamond + Manrope (4 weights) + 5 og-images — частая причина LCP > 3s на 4G. Требует @sentry/browser с tracesSampleRate=0.1 и replayIntegration.
